sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57220" key="khroplastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηροπλαστ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:165" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.165</biblScope> </bibl>; <sense id="n57220.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ ὕλη [ἐστὶν ἄμορφος] πρὸς -κήν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1545.tlg001:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ocell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
